basic_details.job_title: Assam University Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 31 Electrician, MTS and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Various Non-Teaching posts (Group A, B & C)
basic_details.application_mode: Online, followed by mandatory hard copy submission
basic_details.total_vacancies: 31 posts across 16 categories (plus 2 backlog reserved posts of Laboratory Attendant, PwBD)
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Screening, Written Test/Skill Test (Group B & C); University's own procedure for Group A (no interview for Group B & C posts)
basic_details.short_information: Assam University, Silchar has released Employment Notification No. 3/2026 dated 6 July 2026, inviting online applications from Indian nationals for 16 categories of Non-Teaching posts (Group A, B & C) at its headquarters in Silchar, Assam. The recruitment covers key administrative, technical, and library positions including Finance Officer, Director (Computer Centre), Controller of Examinations, Executive Engineer, Deputy Registrar, and several clerical, technical, and attendant-level posts.

important_dates.hard copy submission (preferable window): Within 15 days of the last date of online submission
important_dates.essential qualification cut-off date: 6 December 2025 (qualification must be acquired on or before this date)

application_fee.details: ₹1,000/- (non-refundable, online payment) for UR, EWS, and OBC candidates applying for Sl No. 01-07 ₹500/- (non-refundable, online payment) for UR, EWS, and OBC candidates applying for Sl No. 08-16 No application fee for SC, ST, PwBD, Ex-servicemen, and Women candidates; however, they must pay ₹200/- towards postal expenses Candidates applying for more than one post must apply and pay fees separately for each post

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: Master's degree (55% marks) with 15 years' relevant academic/administrative experience, or 15 years' administrative experience including 8 years as Deputy Registrar or equivalent
Ph.D. in Computer Science/allied discipline with 10+ research publications and 10 years' teaching/research experience, or equivalent industry experience
Master's degree (55% marks) with 15 years' relevant academic/administrative experience, or 15 years' administrative experience including 8 years as Deputy Registrar or equivalent
First Class Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering with 8 years' experience as Assistant Engineer in CPWD/State PWD or equivalent organizations
Officers from Audit & Accounts Services (Central/State) holding analogous posts, or with prescribed regular service in Audit & Accounts at Level 10/11
Master's degree (55% marks) with 5 years' experience as Assistant Registrar or equivalent in Pay Level 10 and above
Master's degree in Library/Information/Documentation Science (55% marks); NET/SLET/SET qualified or Ph.D. as per UGC norms
Bachelor's degree with 3 years' experience as Assistant (Level 6) or 8 years as UDC (Level 4); computer proficiency, noting & drafting
Bachelor's degree with 3 years' experience as UDC or equivalent (Level 4); typing, computer applications, noting & drafting
Bachelor's degree with 2 years' experience as LDC or equivalent; English typing @35 wpm or Hindi @30 wpm; computer proficiency
Bachelor's degree in Science with 2 years' experience maintaining scientific instruments in a laboratory
HSLC passed with ITI Certificate/Electrical Workman permit or equivalent, plus 2 years' experience
Bachelor's degree with English typing @35 wpm or Hindi @30 wpm; computer proficiency
10+2 with Science stream, or 10th pass with Science plus a skill certificate in Laboratory Technology
10+2 with a certificate course in Library Science; 1 year experience in a University/College library; basic computer knowledge

qualification.details: Candidates who have not acquired the essential qualification as on 6 December 2025 will not be eligible and need not apply. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Ex-servicemen candidates is applicable as per Government of India guidelines.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be placed as per the 7th CPC Pay Matrix Level applicable to each post, ranging from Level-1 (₹18,000-56,900) for attendant/MTS-level posts up to Level-14 (₹1,44,200-2,18,200) for Group A posts such as Finance Officer, Director (Computer Centre), and Controller of Examinations, along with applicable allowances. New Pension Scheme rules will apply upon appointment.

selection_process: The University may conduct a Written Test/Skill Test for all Group B and Group C posts
or a Noting/Drafting/Skill Test as per job requirements. As per Government of India/UGC directives

no interview will be held for Group B and Group C posts; merit will be determined based on qualifications and test/skill evaluation. The University may adopt its own procedure for recruitment to Group A Non-Teaching posts. Applications will be screened and shortlisted by Screening Committees; mere eligibility does not guarantee a call for test/interview. SC/ST outstation candidates called for tests/interviews will be reimbursed to-and-fro rail fare (Sleeper Class) or ordinary bus fare by the shortest route
except those already in Central/State Government/PSU/Local Government service.
how_to_apply: Ensure you fulfil the eligibility criteria for age and qualification for the specific post before applying.
Register on the recruitment portal: https://ausnt.samarth.edu.in (or https://curec.samarth.ac.in for Assistant Librarian).
Fill in the prescribed electronic application form online with accurate personal, educational, and contact details.
Pay the applicable application fee online through the payment gateway (where applicable).
Submit the application online on or before 16 August 2026, 11:59 pm.
Take a printout of the submitted application and prepare a hard copy along with self-attested copies of all relevant documents, serially numbered as claimed in the online form.

Submit the hard copy (single copy) to: Deputy Registrar, Room No. 103, Raja Rammohan Ray Administrative Building, Assam University, Silchar, Pin-788011, Cachar, Assam — preferably within 15 days of the online submission deadline.
For technical issues while applying online, email [email protected].

content_sections.heading: Assam University Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 Notification Out
content_sections.text: Assam University, Silchar has invited online applications for filling up various Non-Teaching posts on direct recruitment and deputation basis at its HQ Silchar. Eligible candidates can apply only through the University's online application portal. Notification: Assam University Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Apply Link (Sl No. 1-6, 8-16): Apply Here Apply Link (Sl No. 7 – Assistant Librarian): Apply Here Official Website: Click Here

content_sections.heading: Assam University Non-Teaching Vacancy 2026 Details
content_sections.text: A total of 31 vacancies across 16 post categories (Group A, B & C) have been notified, along with 2 backlog reserved posts of Laboratory Attendant (PwBD). Backlog Reserved Vacancies: Laboratory Attendant – 2 posts (PwBD category). Note: The post of Director, Computer Centre is a non-teaching position for supporting teaching and research activities. Applications for Assistant Librancy must be submitted separately via https://curec.samarth.ac.in .

content_sections.heading: Assam University Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates who have not acquired the essential qualification as on 6 December 2025 will not be eligible and need not apply. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Ex-servicemen candidates is applicable as per Government of India guidelines.

rows.essential_qualification_summary: Master's degree (55% marks) with 15 years' relevant academic/administrative experience, or 15 years' administrative experience including 8 years as Deputy Registrar or equivalent
Ph.D. in Computer Science/allied discipline with 10+ research publications and 10 years' teaching/research experience, or equivalent industry experience
Master's degree (55% marks) with 15 years' relevant academic/administrative experience, or 15 years' administrative experience including 8 years as Deputy Registrar or equivalent
First Class Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering with 8 years' experience as Assistant Engineer in CPWD/State PWD or equivalent organizations
Officers from Audit & Accounts Services (Central/State) holding analogous posts, or with prescribed regular service in Audit & Accounts at Level 10/11
Master's degree (55% marks) with 5 years' experience as Assistant Registrar or equivalent in Pay Level 10 and above
Master's degree in Library/Information/Documentation Science (55% marks); NET/SLET/SET qualified or Ph.D. as per UGC norms
Bachelor's degree with 3 years' experience as Assistant (Level 6) or 8 years as UDC (Level 4); computer proficiency, noting & drafting
Bachelor's degree with 3 years' experience as UDC or equivalent (Level 4); typing, computer applications, noting & drafting
Bachelor's degree with 2 years' experience as LDC or equivalent; English typing @35 wpm or Hindi @30 wpm; computer proficiency
Bachelor's degree in Science with 2 years' experience maintaining scientific instruments in a laboratory
HSLC passed with ITI Certificate/Electrical Workman permit or equivalent, plus 2 years' experience
Bachelor's degree with English typing @35 wpm or Hindi @30 wpm; computer proficiency
10+2 with Science stream, or 10th pass with Science plus a skill certificate in Laboratory Technology
10+2 with a certificate course in Library Science; 1 year experience in a University/College library; basic computer knowledge

content_sections.heading: Assam University Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 Salary Structure
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will be placed as per the 7th CPC Pay Matrix Level applicable to each post, ranging from Level-1 (₹18,000-56,900) for attendant/MTS-level posts up to Level-14 (₹1,44,200-2,18,200) for Group A posts such as Finance Officer, Director (Computer Centre), and Controller of Examinations, along with applicable allowances. New Pension Scheme rules will apply upon appointment.

content_sections.heading: Assam University Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: ₹1,000/- (non-refundable, online payment) for UR, EWS, and OBC candidates applying for Sl No. 01-07 ₹500/- (non-refundable, online payment) for UR, EWS, and OBC candidates applying for Sl No. 08-16 No application fee for SC, ST, PwBD, Ex-servicemen, and Women candidates; however, they must pay ₹200/- towards postal expenses Candidates applying for more than one post must apply and pay fees separately for each post

content_sections.heading: Assam University Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: The University may conduct a Written Test/Skill Test for all Group B and Group C posts, covering Reasoning Ability, Simple Arithmetic, General Knowledge, Domain Knowledge, Finance & Accounts, Examinations, and Language Proficiency in English/Hindi, or a Noting/Drafting/Skill Test as per job requirements. As per Government of India/UGC directives, no interview will be held for Group B and Group C posts; merit will be determined based on qualifications and test/skill evaluation. The University may adopt its own procedure for recruitment to Group A Non-Teaching posts. Applications will be screened and shortlisted by Screening Committees; mere eligibility does not guarantee a call for test/interview. SC/ST outstation candidates called for tests/interviews will be reimbursed to-and-fro rail fare (Sleeper Class) or ordinary bus fare by the shortest route, except those already in Central/State Government/PSU/Local Government service.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for Assam University Non-Teaching Application
content_sections.text: Self-attested copies of proof of academic qualifications and mark sheets Self-attested copies of experience certificates Caste/category certificate (SC/ST/OBC-NCL/EWS, as applicable) in the prescribed Government of India format Disability certificate (for PwBD candidates claiming benefits, disability not less than 40%) Income & Asset certificate (for EWS candidates) Proof of publications, where applicable (Group A posts) No Objection Certificate from present employer, if already in service

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Assam University Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Ensure you fulfil the eligibility criteria for age and qualification for the specific post before applying. Register on the recruitment portal: https://ausnt.samarth.edu.in (or https://curec.samarth.ac.in for Assistant Librarian). Fill in the prescribed electronic application form online with accurate personal, educational, and contact details. Pay the applicable application fee online through the payment gateway (where applicable). Submit the application online on or before 16 August 2026, 11:59 pm. Take a printout of the submitted application and prepare a hard copy along with self-attested copies of all relevant documents, serially numbered as claimed in the online form. Submit the hard copy (single copy) to: Deputy Registrar, Room No. 103, Raja Rammohan Ray Administrative Building, Assam University, Silchar, Pin-788011, Cachar, Assam — preferably within 15 days of the online submission deadline. For technical issues while applying online, email [email protected] .

faq.question: Q1. How many Non-Teaching vacancies has Assam University announced in 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 31 vacancies across 16 post categories (Group A, B & C) have been notified, along with 2 backlog reserved posts of Laboratory Attendant (PwBD).

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Assam University Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Online applications along with fee payment must be submitted by 16 August 2026, till 11:59 pm.

faq.question: Q3. Is hard copy submission required in addition to the online application?
faq.answer: Yes, submission of a hard copy of the application along with self-attested documents is mandatory, preferably within 15 days of the online submission deadline, to the Deputy Registrar's office at Assam University, Silchar.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for Assam University Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: ₹1,000/- for Sl No. 01-07 and ₹500/- for Sl No. 08-16 for UR/EWS/OBC candidates; no fee for SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-servicemen/Women candidates, though they must pay ₹200/- towards postal expenses.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Assam University Non-Teaching posts?
faq.answer: Age limits vary by post, ranging from 28 years (Electrician) to 57 years (Director, Computer Centre); the last date of application (16 August 2026) is the crucial date for determining age.

faq.question: Q6. Will there be an interview for these posts?
faq.answer: No, as per Government of India/UGC directives, no interview will be held for Group B and Group C posts; selection will be based on qualifications and a Written Test/Skill Test where conducted. Group A posts will follow the University's own selection procedure.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates who applied under earlier Assam University notifications reapply?
faq.answer: No, candidates who already applied for certain posts under earlier notifications (2/2023, 1/2024, 2/2024, 2/2025) need not reapply, but may submit updated biodata by email to [email protected] by 16 August 2026.

faq.question: Q8. How can candidates apply for the Assistant Librarian post separately?
faq.answer: Applications for the Assistant Librarian post must be submitted through a separate portal: https://curec.samarth.ac.in, unlike other posts which use https://ausnt.samarth.edu.in.
